troubleshooting.title: Discovery Output Looks Incorrect
troubleshooting.shortdesc: Resolve discovery inventory or relationship anomalies before you continue to planning.

troublebody.p: Problem: Discovery counts, classifications, or relationship edges do not match expected package structure.
Cause: XML parsing issues, unsupported edge case structures, incorrect package root selection, or missing plugin patterns for corpus-specific structures.

ul.li: Confirm package root path is correct and includes the expected files.
Inspect map and topic artifacts: jq '.artifacts[] | {path, artifact_type, classification, metadata}' build/discovery.json.
Inspect relationships: jq '.relationships[] | {source, type, target}' build/discovery.json.
Run with debug logging: python3 -m dita_package_processor --log-level DEBUG discover ....
Add or adjust patterns for recurring unsupported structures and rerun discovery.
